title: hieracium caesium subsp. helsingicum
intro: Hieracium caesium subsp. helsingicum, also known as the lesser hawk's beard, is a flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Hieracium caesium subsp. helsingicum are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various ailments.
